releases.title: MVP
releases.goal: A shippable first version users can sign up for and use daily.
releases.exit: A new user signs up, completes onboarding, and performs the core action on production.

releases.title: Growth
releases.exit: Weekly retention is measurable and trending up.

phases.title: MVP
phases.goal: A usable first version a real user can sign up for and use daily.
phases.exit: A new user signs up, completes onboarding, and performs the core action without help.

epics.title: Auth and sign-up
epics.goal: Email + password sign-up with sessions in httpOnly cookies.
epics.exit: A new email registers, logs in, and stays logged in across a refresh.

epics.title: Onboarding wizard
epics.goal: A 3-step wizard that gets a new user to their first value.
epics.exit: A first-time user finishes the wizard and lands on a populated home screen.

epics.title: Domain + production deploy
epics.goal: Buy the domain and stand up a production environment.
epics.exit: The app is reachable over HTTPS on the production domain.

epics.title: Analytics baseline
epics.exit: A dashboard query returns daily sign-up counts.

phases.title: Growth
phases.exit: Weekly retention is measurable and trending up.

epics.title: Email digests
epics.goal: A weekly digest email of what the user missed.
epics.exit: A test user receives a correct digest on schedule.
